name: python3-flask-mail
title: python3-flask-mail
description:
Flask extension for sending email
The Flask-Mail extension provides a simple interface to set up SMTP with
your Flask application and to send messages from your views and scripts.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-mail because Flask extension for sending email.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-mail as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-mail with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-mail --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
